subject: Expedition Uniform — item card depicting an orange backpack and a dark blue or black vest or jacket laid out together, suggesting explorer or traveler gear
description: The card art shows two pieces of explorer or traveler gear laid out side by side against a plain background: a large rounded orange backpack on the left and what appears to be a dark navy vest or jacket with straps on the right. The items are rendered in a clean illustrative style with visible detail on the pouches and fastenings of the backpack. The composition is simple still-life. The palette is warm orange against dark cool navy, set against a neutral background.
foreground: orange backpack and dark navy vest or jacket with straps, arranged as a still-life pair
